title: smoky Greek monsoon bryani
description: A smoky twist on the classic Greek bryani, featuring sautéed onions and beurre monte for a rich and satisfying flavor.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the carnitas and cook until browned, breaking up with a spoon as needed.
Add the sliced onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in cumin, coriander, and smoked paprika, and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in beurre monte and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
Cook the carnitas in a separate pan before starting the recipe for best flavor.
